title: ZXSpace

hero.alt: ZX Series arcade game collection featuring ZXSnake, ZXBrick and ZXSpace

shortDescription: Defend cities against relentless alien invasions in this modern take on a classic arcade shooter.
description: ZXSpace is part of the [ZX Series](/zx-series), combining classic alien invasion gameplay with modern mobile features. Defend cities from relentless waves of attackers, protect your shield, collect power-ups, unlock cosmetic upgrades, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete through achievements and leaderboards.
features: Protect cities from relentless alien invasion waves
Multiple alien formations with unique scoring opportunities
Segmented shield defence with destructible sections
Double Laser and Shield Repair power-ups
Wave completion rewards and BarkinMad Coins
Cross-game cosmetic unlocks using BarkinMad Coins

barkinMadCoins.description: Earn [BarkinMad Coins](/zx-series) through gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic rewards across supported BarkinMad Studios games. Coins have no cash value and are earned entirely through gameplay.

seoTitle: ZXSpace | Retro City-Defence Arcade Shooter | BarkinMad Studios
summary: ZXSpace is a retro-inspired city-defence arcade shooter featuring alien invasion waves, shield management, power-ups, achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins.
